name: Built to last
title: Built to last
desc: Epoxy flooring withstands forklifts, dropped tools, heavy point loads, and constant foot traffic without cracking, chipping, or wearing through, protecting your concrete substrate for decades.

name: Chemical resistance
title: Chemical resistance
desc: Engineered to resist oils, solvents, acids, caustics, and harsh cleaning agents, epoxy coatings prevent staining, etching, and degradation in even the most chemically aggressive environments.

name: Seamless and hygienic
title: Seamless and hygienic
desc: With no grout lines, joints, or porous seams to trap bacteria, epoxy floors eliminate harborage points and meet FDA, USDA, and healthcare sanitation standards with ease.

name: Slip-resistant safety
title: Slip-resistant safety
desc: Custom-engineered aggregate textures deliver reliable traction in wet, oily, or high-traffic areas, reducing slip-and-fall incidents while staying easy to clean and sanitize.

name: Low maintenance
title: Low maintenance
desc: Easy to sweep, mop, and disinfect, epoxy floors resist staining and damage that would sideline traditional flooring, cutting cleaning time and long-term operating costs.

name: Long-term value
title: Long-term value
desc: Properly installed epoxy systems can last 20+ years, dramatically outperforming tile, sealed concrete, or VCT, and delivering a stronger ROI through reduced replacement and downtime.
